sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3087" key="a)ke/rkistos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκέρκιστος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">κερκίζω</etym>) <sense id="n3087.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">unwoven,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.472</biblScope> </bibl> (<placeName TEIform="placeName">Leon</placeName>).</sense> </entryFree>
